{{CargoRelic
|name=World's Number One
|class_id=20259
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=In every autumn, the Mantises hold a martial arts competition to see who's the best fighter of the year. The last Mantis standing in the arena will be awarded with this plaque as a recognition of their extraordinary strength.
|fame=14
|art=15
|fth=31
|civ=13
|tech=17
|ss1=Against Mantises, Troop Casualty -1%
|ss2=Against Mantises, Troop Casualty -2%
|ss3=Against Mantises, Troop Casualty -3%
|ss4=Against Mantises, Troop Casualty -3%
|ss7=Against Mantises, Troop Casualty -3%<br> (Awakened)
}}
